headline: ADP National Employment Report Preliminary Estimate for June 6, 2026
summary: For the four weeks ending June 6, 2026, U.S. private employers added an average of 30,750 jobs per week, according to the NER Pulse, a weekly update of the monthly ADP National Employment Report (NER).
